# Extracting the rate of a threeRuleSmooth

The function `smoothed.rate` returns the high-frequency rate from a
[threeRuleSmooth](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/threeRuleSmooth.md)
object.

## Usage

``` r
smoothed.rate(object)
```

## Arguments

- object:

  a threeRuleSmooth object.

## Examples

``` r
benchmark <- threeRuleSmooth(turnover,construction); smoothed.rate(benchmark)
#>            Jan       Feb       Mar       Apr       May       Jun       Jul
```
